Terroir

Erin Treiber

#setup ##clears everything out

rm(list = ls())
gc()
##          used (Mb) gc trigger (Mb) max used (Mb)
## Ncells 446682 23.9     954410   51   643648 34.4
## Vcells 801299  6.2    8388608   64  1648626 12.6

##set working directory

#setwd("~/Desktop/Terroir_2019")
setwd("C:/Users/clark776/Dropbox/ENOLOGY DATA/Terroir Study Matt Working Data")

##load packages

library(ggplot2)
library(plyr)
library(dplyr)
## 
## Attaching package: 'dplyr'
## The following objects are masked from 'package:plyr':
## 
##     arrange, count, desc, failwith, id, mutate, rename, summarise,
##     summarize
## The following objects are masked from 'package:stats':
## 
##     filter, lag
## The following objects are masked from 'package:base':
## 
##     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(reshape2)
## 
## Attaching package: 'reshape2'
## The following object is masked from 'package:tidyr':
## 
##     smiths

#Cluster data 2019 #Brianna ##load data

data <- read.csv("Terroir_2019_Brianna.csv")

##partition data

weekb <- filter(data, data$sample_week =="b")
weekc <- filter(data, data$sample_week =="c")

#aspect ratio ##Linear model and ANOVA

asp_rat <- lm(aspect_ratio ~ location+cluster+image+date+location*cluster*image*date, data)
anova(asp_rat)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: aspect_ratio
##                             Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value   Pr(>F)   
## location                     2 0.2905 0.14524  2.8943 0.061083 . 
## cluster                      1 0.0022 0.00218  0.0434 0.835587   
## image                        1 0.0002 0.00024  0.0049 0.944491   
## date                         1 0.0161 0.01611  0.3211 0.572512   
## location:cluster             2 0.0694 0.03470  0.6915 0.503757   
## location:image               2 0.0158 0.00790  0.1574 0.854657   
## cluster:image                1 0.0298 0.02985  0.5948 0.442821   
## location:date                1 0.5171 0.51713 10.3054 0.001902 **
## cluster:date                 1 0.0531 0.05309  1.0579 0.306761   
## image:date                   1 0.0009 0.00086  0.0171 0.896280   
## location:cluster:image       2 0.0382 0.01911  0.3809 0.684460   
## location:cluster:date        1 0.4781 0.47810  9.5274 0.002771 **
## location:image:date          1 0.0037 0.00373  0.0744 0.785773   
## cluster:image:date           1 0.0513 0.05128  1.0219 0.315074   
## location:cluster:image:date  1 0.0164 0.01641  0.3270 0.569030   
## Residuals                   81 4.0647 0.05018                    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
plot(asp_rat,which=c(1,2))

ggplot(data, aes(aspect_ratio, location, fill=factor(location)))+ #use this box plot!
  geom_boxplot()+
  coord_flip()+
  facet_grid(variety~date, scales="free")

##Linear model and ANOVA Week b only

asp_rat_b <- lm(aspect_ratio ~ location+cluster+image+location*cluster*image, weekb)
anova(asp_rat_b)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: aspect_ratio
##                        Df  Sum Sq  Mean Sq F value   Pr(>F)   
## location                2 0.21920 0.109602  2.6138 0.083658 . 
## cluster                 1 0.02948 0.029480  0.7030 0.405922   
## image                   1 0.00033 0.000327  0.0078 0.930035   
## location:cluster        2 0.46426 0.232130  5.5359 0.006866 **
## location:image          2 0.00322 0.001612  0.0384 0.962324   
## cluster:image           1 0.09314 0.093140  2.2212 0.142669   
## location:cluster:image  2 0.03653 0.018264  0.4356 0.649432   
## Residuals              48 2.01273 0.041932                    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
plot(asp_rat_b,which=c(1,2))

##Linear model and ANOVA Week c only

asp_rat_c <- lm(aspect_ratio ~ location+cluster+image+cluster*image*location, weekc)
anova(asp_rat_c)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: aspect_ratio
##                        Df  Sum Sq Mean Sq F value   Pr(>F)   
## location                1 0.60406 0.60406  9.7148 0.003773 **
## cluster                 1 0.01815 0.01815  0.2919 0.592620   
## image                   1 0.00251 0.00251  0.0403 0.842096   
## cluster:image           1 0.01003 0.01003  0.1613 0.690532   
## location:cluster        1 0.09139 0.09139  1.4698 0.233988   
## location:image          1 0.00830 0.00830  0.1335 0.717151   
## location:cluster:image  1 0.00005 0.00005  0.0008 0.978215   
## Residuals              33 2.05193 0.06218                    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
plot(asp_rat_c,which=c(1,2))

#cluster roundness ##Linear model and ANOVA

cl_rnd <- lm(cluster_roundness ~ location+cluster+image+date+location*cluster*image*date, data)
anova(cl_rnd)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: cluster_roundness
##                             Df  Sum Sq   Mean Sq F value  Pr(>F)  
## location                     2 0.02395 0.0119733  1.7660 0.17753  
## cluster                      1 0.01914 0.0191407  2.8232 0.09677 .
## image                        1 0.00011 0.0001062  0.0157 0.90071  
## date                         1 0.02612 0.0261154  3.8519 0.05312 .
## location:cluster             2 0.03291 0.0164535  2.4268 0.09471 .
## location:image               2 0.00245 0.0012255  0.1808 0.83497  
## cluster:image                1 0.00096 0.0009575  0.1412 0.70805  
## location:date                1 0.00506 0.0050631  0.7468 0.39005  
## cluster:date                 1 0.00586 0.0058650  0.8651 0.35509  
## image:date                   1 0.00078 0.0007814  0.1152 0.73513  
## location:cluster:image       2 0.00002 0.0000123  0.0018 0.99819  
## location:cluster:date        1 0.01792 0.0179157  2.6425 0.10793  
## location:image:date          1 0.00225 0.0022478  0.3315 0.56635  
## cluster:image:date           1 0.00096 0.0009642  0.1422 0.70707  
## location:cluster:image:date  1 0.00152 0.0015225  0.2246 0.63686  
## Residuals                   81 0.54917 0.0067799                  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
plot(cl_rnd,which=c(1,2))

ggplot(data, aes(cluster_roundness, location, fill=factor(location)))+ #use this box plot!
  geom_boxplot()+
  coord_flip()+
  facet_grid(variety~date, scales="free")

##Linear model and ANOVA week b only

cl_rnd_b <- lm(cluster_roundness ~ location+cluster+image+location*cluster*image, weekb)
anova(cl_rnd_b)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: cluster_roundness
##                        Df  Sum Sq   Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)
## location                2 0.03606 0.0180317  1.8946 0.1614
## cluster                 1 0.01208 0.0120768  1.2690 0.2656
## image                   1 0.00008 0.0000817  0.0086 0.9266
## location:cluster        2 0.03265 0.0163268  1.7155 0.1907
## location:image          2 0.00158 0.0007917  0.0832 0.9203
## cluster:image           1 0.00001 0.0000146  0.0015 0.9689
## location:cluster:image  2 0.00120 0.0006004  0.0631 0.9389
## Residuals              48 0.45682 0.0095172
plot(cl_rnd_b,which=c(1,2))

##Linear model and ANOVA week c only

cl_rnd_c <- lm(cluster_roundness ~ location+cluster+image+location*cluster*image, weekc)
anova(cl_rnd_c)
## Analysis of Variance Table

## location:image          1 0.003393 0.0033933  1.2126 0.278781   
## cluster:image           1 0.001609 0.0016090  0.5750 0.453663

## Residuals              33 0.092345 0.0027983

plot(cl_rnd_c,which=c(1,2))

#compact shape factor ##Linear model and ANOVA

cmp_shp <- lm(comp_shp_fact ~ location+cluster+image+date+location*cluster*image*date, data)
anova(cmp_shp)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: comp_shp_fact
##                             Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value   Pr(>F)   
## location                     2  474.8  237.39  3.7321 0.028155 * 
## cluster                      1   77.1   77.08  1.2118 0.274244   
## image                        1    1.4    1.45  0.0227 0.880498   
## date                         1  140.2  140.17  2.2037 0.141561

## cluster:image                1   20.3   20.31  0.3193 0.573593   
## location:date                1   79.4   79.38  1.2479 0.267259

## image:date                   1    5.8    5.83  0.0917 0.762854   
## location:cluster:image       2    2.9    1.43  0.0225 0.977790

## Residuals                   81 5152.2   63.61                    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
plot(cmp_shp,which=c(1,2))

ggplot(data, aes(comp_shp_fact, location, fill=factor(location)))+ #use this box plot!
  geom_boxplot()+
  coord_flip()+
  facet_grid(variety~date, scales="free")

#Frontenac Gris ##load data

data <- read.csv("Terroir_2019_FrontenacGris.csv")

#aspect ratio ##Linear model and ANOVA

asp_rat <- lm(aspect_ratio ~ location+cluster+image+location*cluster*image, data)
anova(asp_rat)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: aspect_ratio
##                        Df  Sum Sq  Mean Sq F value  Pr(>F)  
## location                1 0.02500 0.025000  1.6970 0.20197  
## cluster                 1 0.00088 0.000884  0.0600 0.80809  
## image                   1 0.00576 0.005760  0.3910 0.53621  
## location:cluster        1 0.09001 0.090008  6.1098 0.01895 *
## location:image          1 0.00001 0.000010  0.0007 0.97938

  geom_boxplot()+
  coord_flip()+
  facet_grid(variety~date, scales="free")

  facet_grid(variety~date, scales="free")

#LaCrescent ##load data

data <- read.csv("Terroir_2019_LaCrescent.csv")

##partition data

weeka <- filter(data, data$sample_week =="a")
weekb <- filter(data, data$sample_week =="b")

#aspect ratio ##Linear model and ANOVA

asp_rat <- lm(aspect_ratio ~ location+cluster+image+date+location*cluster*image*date, data)
anova(asp_rat)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: aspect_ratio
##                              Df  Sum Sq  Mean Sq F value  Pr(>F)  
## location                      1 0.14352 0.143521  5.4004 0.02208 *
## cluster                       1 0.06012 0.060122  2.2623 0.13559  
## image                         1 0.14370 0.143705  5.4073 0.02199 *
## date                          1 0.01745 0.017448  0.6565 0.41964  
## location:cluster              1 0.03977 0.039773  1.4966 0.22396  
## location:image                1 0.05328 0.053276  2.0047 0.15981  
## cluster:image                 1 0.08868 0.088677  3.3367 0.07062 .
## location:date                 1 0.04446 0.044457  1.6728 0.19875  
## cluster:date                  1 0.02193 0.021930  0.8252 0.36576  
## image:date                    1 0.01953 0.019530  0.7349 0.39328  
## location:cluster:image        1 0.09193 0.091928  3.4591 0.06573 .
## location:cluster:date         1 0.01806 0.018058  0.6795 0.41165  
## location:image:date           1 0.01415 0.014148  0.5324 0.46725  
## cluster:image:date            1 0.00035 0.000352  0.0132 0.90859  
## location:cluster:image:date   1 0.01015 0.010150  0.3819 0.53792  
## Residuals                   104 2.76390 0.026576                  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
plot(asp_rat,which=c(1,2))

ggplot(data, aes(aspect_ratio, location, fill=factor(location)))+ #use this box plot!
  geom_boxplot()+
  coord_flip()+
  facet_grid(variety~date, scales="free")

##Linear model and ANOVA Week a only

asp_rat_a <- lm(aspect_ratio ~ location+cluster+image+location*cluster*image, weeka)
anova(asp_rat_a)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: aspect_ratio
##                        Df  Sum Sq  Mean Sq F value   Pr(>F)   
## location                1 0.22791 0.227911  8.4602 0.004824 **
## cluster                 1 0.12451 0.124506  4.6217 0.034929 * 
## image                   1 0.05130 0.051302  1.9044 0.171860   
## location:cluster        1 0.02406 0.024061  0.8932 0.347784   
## location:image          1 0.02088 0.020880  0.7751 0.381577   
## cluster:image           1 0.03921 0.039209  1.4555 0.231601   
## location:cluster:image  1 0.08155 0.081553  3.0273 0.086148 . 
## Residuals              72 1.93963 0.026939                    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
plot(asp_rat_a,which=c(1,2))

##Linear model and ANOVA Week b only

asp_rat_b <- lm(aspect_ratio ~ location+cluster+image+cluster*image*location, weekb)
anova(asp_rat_b)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: aspect_ratio
##                        Df  Sum Sq  Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)
## location                1 0.00036 0.000360  0.0140 0.9066
## cluster                 1 0.00552 0.005523  0.2144 0.6465
## image                   1 0.04761 0.047610  1.8483 0.1835
## cluster:image           1 0.00184 0.001844  0.0716 0.7908
## location:cluster        1 0.01589 0.015891  0.6169 0.4380
## location:image          1 0.00625 0.006250  0.2426 0.6257
## location:cluster:image  1 0.03840 0.038405  1.4909 0.2310
## Residuals              32 0.82428 0.025759
plot(asp_rat_b,which=c(1,2))

#cluster roundness ##Linear model and ANOVA

cl_rnd <- lm(cluster_roundness ~ location+cluster+image+date+location*cluster*image*date, data)
anova(cl_rnd)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: cluster_roundness
##                              Df   Sum Sq  Mean Sq F value    Pr(>F)    
## location                      1 0.049207 0.049207 17.1864 6.928e-05 ***
## cluster                       1 0.007948 0.007948  2.7758 0.0987098 .  
## image                         1 0.004025 0.004025  1.4058 0.2384651    
## date                          1 0.015779 0.015779  5.5110 0.0207905 *  
## location:cluster              1 0.032876 0.032876 11.4823 0.0009934 ***
## location:image                1 0.004742 0.004742  1.6561 0.2009899    
## cluster:image                 1 0.005869 0.005869  2.0500 0.1552077    
## location:date                 1 0.036320 0.036320 12.6854 0.0005576 ***
## cluster:date                  1 0.007971 0.007971  2.7840 0.0982182 .  
## image:date                    1 0.000145 0.000145  0.0508 0.8221159    
## location:cluster:image        1 0.011204 0.011204  3.9130 0.0505586 .  
## location:cluster:date         1 0.000362 0.000362  0.1264 0.7228898    
## location:image:date           1 0.000076 0.000076  0.0267 0.8705129    
## cluster:image:date            1 0.004222 0.004222  1.4746 0.2273642    
## location:cluster:image:date   1 0.000263 0.000263  0.0919 0.7624213    
## Residuals                   104 0.297769 0.002863                      
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
plot(cl_rnd,which=c(1,2))

ggplot(data, aes(cluster_roundness, location, fill=factor(location)))+ #use this box plot!
  geom_boxplot()+
  coord_flip()+
  facet_grid(variety~date, scales="free")

##Linear model and ANOVA week a

cl_rnd_a <- lm(cluster_roundness ~ location+cluster+image+location*cluster*image, weeka)
anova(cl_rnd_a)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: cluster_roundness
##                        Df   Sum Sq  Mean Sq F value    Pr(>F)    
## location                1 0.088445 0.088445 31.0314 4.137e-07 ***
## cluster                 1 0.000049 0.000049  0.0172 0.8959520    
## image                   1 0.000025 0.000025  0.0088 0.9256429    
## location:cluster        1 0.034186 0.034186 11.9942 0.0009023 ***
## location:image          1 0.000576 0.000576  0.2021 0.6543876    
## cluster:image           1 0.002258 0.002258  0.7924 0.3763433    
## location:cluster:image  1 0.006028 0.006028  2.1149 0.1502202    
## Residuals              72 0.205213 0.002850                      
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
plot(cl_rnd_a,which=c(1,2))

##Linear model and ANOVA week b

cl_rnd_b <- lm(cluster_roundness ~ location+cluster+image +location*cluster*image, weekb)
anova(cl_rnd_b)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: cluster_roundness
##                        Df   Sum Sq   Mean Sq F value  Pr(>F)  
## location                1 0.001322 0.0013225  0.4572 0.50378  
## cluster                 1 0.020881 0.0208807  7.2192 0.01134 *
## image                   1 0.000123 0.0001225  0.0424 0.83825  
## location:cluster        1 0.002764 0.0027637  0.9555 0.33565  
## location:image          1 0.000002 0.0000025  0.0009 0.97673  
## cluster:image           1 0.002822 0.0028219  0.9756 0.33069  
## location:cluster:image  1 0.001727 0.0017273  0.5972 0.44532  
## Residuals              32 0.092556 0.0028924                  
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
plot(cl_rnd_b,which=c(1,2))

#compact shape factor ##Linear model and ANOVA

cmp_shp <- lm(comp_shp_fact ~ location+cluster+image+date+location*cluster*image*date, data)
anova(cmp_shp)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: comp_shp_fact
##                              Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value    Pr(>F)    
## location                      1  15286 15286.2 14.9355 0.0001939 ***
## cluster                       1  14335 14334.8 14.0060 0.0002989 ***
## image                         1    417   416.5  0.4069 0.5249249    
## date                          1   1957  1957.0  1.9121 0.1696874    
## location:cluster              1   9777  9777.2  9.5529 0.0025620 ** 
## location:image                1   1339  1338.9  1.3082 0.2553439    
## cluster:image                 1      7     7.3  0.0071 0.9330742    
## location:date                 1   8707  8707.2  8.5074 0.0043338 ** 
## cluster:date                  1     48    48.0  0.0469 0.8289245    
## image:date                    1    169   169.3  0.1654 0.6850599    
## location:cluster:image        1   4575  4575.0  4.4700 0.0368855 *  
## location:cluster:date         1   1648  1648.0  1.6102 0.2072910    
## location:image:date           1     40    39.9  0.0389 0.8439485    
## cluster:image:date            1    381   380.6  0.3719 0.5433221    
## location:cluster:image:date   1      2     1.9  0.0018 0.9660856    
## Residuals                   104 106442  1023.5                      
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
plot(cmp_shp,which=c(1,2))

ggplot(data, aes(comp_shp_fact, location, fill=factor(location)))+ #use this box plot!
  geom_boxplot()+
  coord_flip()+
  facet_grid(variety~date, scales="free")

##Linear model and ANOVA week a

cmp_shp_a <- lm(comp_shp_fact ~ location+cluster+image+location*cluster*image, weeka)
anova(cmp_shp_a)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: comp_shp_fact
##                        Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value    Pr(>F)    
## location                1  25159 25158.5 23.0258 8.404e-06 ***
## cluster                 1   8739  8738.7  7.9980 0.0060609 ** 
## image                   1      8     7.6  0.0069 0.9339632    
## location:cluster        1  14164 14164.0 12.9633 0.0005802 ***
## location:image          1     98    98.1  0.0898 0.7653391    
## cluster:image           1     28    27.7  0.0254 0.8738465    
## location:cluster:image  1   1628  1628.0  1.4900 0.2261956    
## Residuals              72  78669  1092.6                      
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
plot(cmp_shp_a,which=c(1,2))

##Linear model and ANOVA week b

cmp_shp_b <- lm(comp_shp_fact ~ location+cluster+image+location*cluster*image, weekb)
anova(cmp_shp_b)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: comp_shp_fact
##                        Df  Sum Sq Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)  
## location                1   103.4   103.4  0.1191 0.7322  
## cluster                 1  5651.0  5651.0  6.5110 0.0157 *
## image                   1   163.3   163.3  0.1881 0.6674  
## location:cluster        1     8.7     8.7  0.0101 0.9207  
## location:image          1    12.2    12.2  0.0140 0.9065  
## cluster:image           1   353.3   353.3  0.4070 0.5280  
## location:cluster:image  1   201.3   201.3  0.2320 0.6333  
## Residuals              32 27773.1   867.9                 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
plot(cmp_shp_b,which=c(1,2))

#Marquette ##load data

data <- read.csv("Terroir_2019_Marquette.csv")

##partition data

weeka <- filter(data, data$sample_week =="a")
weekb <- filter(data, data$sample_week =="b")
weekc <- filter(data, data$sample_week =="c")

#aspect ratio ##Linear model and ANOVA

asp_rat <- lm(aspect_ratio ~ location+cluster+image+date+location*cluster*image*date, data)
anova(asp_rat)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: aspect_ratio
##                              Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value   Pr(>F)    
## location                      5 2.2429 0.44859 11.7492 5.78e-10 ***
## cluster                       1 0.0586 0.05863  1.5356   0.2167    
## image                         1 0.0077 0.00769  0.2014   0.6540    
## date                          2 0.0027 0.00134  0.0352   0.9654    
## location:cluster              5 0.2076 0.04153  1.0876   0.3684    
## location:image                5 0.0830 0.01659  0.4345   0.8241    
## cluster:image                 1 0.0001 0.00010  0.0025   0.9600    
## location:date                 2 0.0561 0.02804  0.7345   0.4810    
## cluster:date                  2 0.2467 0.12336  3.2309   0.0416 *  
## image:date                    2 0.0088 0.00438  0.1148   0.8916    
## location:cluster:image        5 0.0319 0.00638  0.1671   0.9744    
## location:cluster:date         2 0.0294 0.01472  0.3856   0.6806    
## location:image:date           2 0.0302 0.01512  0.3960   0.6735    
## cluster:image:date            2 0.0367 0.01835  0.4806   0.6191    
## location:cluster:image:date   2 0.0583 0.02915  0.7635   0.4674    
## Residuals                   199 7.5979 0.03818                     
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
plot(asp_rat,which=c(1,2))

ggplot(data, aes(aspect_ratio, location, fill=factor(location)))+ #use this box plot!
  geom_boxplot()+
  coord_flip()+
  facet_grid(variety~date, scales="free")

##Linear model and ANOVA Week a only

asp_rat_a <- lm(aspect_ratio ~ location+cluster+image+location*cluster*image, weeka)
anova(asp_rat_a)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: aspect_ratio
##                        Df Sum Sq Mean Sq F value    Pr(>F)    
## location                1 1.1376 1.13764 21.5082 1.536e-05 ***
## cluster                 1 0.2696 0.26963  5.0976   0.02699 *  
## image                   1 0.0035 0.00348  0.0658   0.79827    
## location:cluster        1 0.0355 0.03549  0.6710   0.41539    
## location:image          1 0.0106 0.01061  0.2006   0.65560    
## cluster:image           1 0.0237 0.02368  0.4477   0.50557    
## location:cluster:image  1 0.0069 0.00692  0.1309   0.71856    
## Residuals              72 3.8083 0.05289                      
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
plot(asp_rat_a,which=c(1,2))

##Linear model and ANOVA Week b only

asp_rat_b <- lm(aspect_ratio ~ location+cluster+image+cluster*image*location, weekb)
anova(asp_rat_b)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: aspect_ratio
##                        Df  Sum Sq  Mean Sq F value    Pr(>F)    
## location                4 0.96077 0.240193  8.2330 1.329e-05 ***
## cluster                 1 0.06744 0.067439  2.3116    0.1324    
## image                   1 0.03087 0.030868  1.0580    0.3068    
## cluster:image           1 0.00096 0.000955  0.0327    0.8569    
## location:cluster        4 0.08582 0.021454  0.7354    0.5706    
## location:image          4 0.04861 0.012151  0.4165    0.7963    
## location:cluster:image  4 0.07544 0.018860  0.6465    0.6310    
## Residuals              79 2.30477 0.029174                      
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
plot(asp_rat_b,which=c(1,2))

##Linear model and ANOVA Week c only

asp_rat_c <- lm(aspect_ratio ~ location+cluster+image+cluster*image*location, weekc)
anova(asp_rat_c)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: aspect_ratio
##                        Df  Sum Sq  Mean Sq F value Pr(>F)
## location                2 0.11109 0.055545  1.7957 0.1770
## cluster                 1 0.04831 0.048307  1.5617 0.2175
## image                   1 0.01350 0.013500  0.4364 0.5120
## cluster:image           1 0.02517 0.025174  0.8138 0.3715
## location:cluster        2 0.00292 0.001459  0.0472 0.9540
## location:image          2 0.02683 0.013415  0.4337 0.6506
## location:cluster:image  2 0.02875 0.014375  0.4647 0.6311
## Residuals              48 1.48477 0.030933
plot(asp_rat_c,which=c(1,2))

#cluster roundness ##Linear model and ANOVA

cl_rnd <- lm(cluster_roundness ~ location+cluster+image+date+location*cluster*image*date, data)
anova(cl_rnd)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: cluster_roundness
##                              Df  Sum Sq  Mean Sq F value    Pr(>F)    
## location                      5 0.76124 0.152247 29.4886 < 2.2e-16 ***
## cluster                       1 0.07373 0.073730 14.2807  0.000208 ***
## image                         1 0.01135 0.011349  2.1982  0.139755    
## date                          2 0.12563 0.062814 12.1663 1.035e-05 ***
## location:cluster              5 0.02306 0.004612  0.8932  0.486607    
## location:image                5 0.00657 0.001313  0.2544  0.937253    
## cluster:image                 1 0.00700 0.007004  1.3566  0.245528    
## location:date                 2 0.01391 0.006953  1.3466  0.262472    
## cluster:date                  2 0.01504 0.007519  1.4563  0.235576    
## image:date                    2 0.00178 0.000889  0.1722  0.841956    
## location:cluster:image        5 0.01331 0.002662  0.5156  0.764321    
## location:cluster:date         2 0.03460 0.017300  3.3508  0.037044 *  
## location:image:date           2 0.00111 0.000557  0.1079  0.897788    
## cluster:image:date            2 0.00045 0.000226  0.0439  0.957099    
## location:cluster:image:date   2 0.00377 0.001885  0.3651  0.694595    
## Residuals                   199 1.02742 0.005163                      
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
plot(cl_rnd,which=c(1,2))

ggplot(data, aes(cluster_roundness, location, fill=factor(location)))+ #use this box plot!
  geom_boxplot()+
  coord_flip()+
  facet_grid(variety~date, scales="free")

##Linear model and ANOVA week a

cl_rnd_a <- lm(cluster_roundness ~ location+cluster+image+location*cluster*image, weeka)
anova(cl_rnd_a)
## Analysis of Variance Table
## 
## Response: cluster_roundness
##                        Df  Sum Sq  Mean Sq F value    Pr(>F)    
## location                1 0.17112 0.171125 34.0801 1.406e-07 ***
## cluster                 1 0.06560 0.065601 13.0646 0.0005542 ***
## image                   1 0.00168 0.001681  0.3348 0.5646652    
## location:cluster        1 0.00193 0.001935  0.3853 0.5367395    
## location:image          1 0.00102 0.001024  0.2039 0.6529220    
## cluster:image           1 0.00054 0.000536  0.1068 0.7448202    
## location:cluster:image  1 0.00255 0.002548  0.5075 0.4785082    
## Residuals              72 0.36153 0.005021                      
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
plot(cl_rnd_a,which=c(1,2))

##Linear model and ANOVA week b

cl_rnd_b <- lm(cluster_roundness ~ location+cluster+image +location*cluster*image, weekb)
anova(cl_rnd_b)

## Response: cluster_roundness

## Residuals              79 0.52456 0.006640

plot(cl_rnd_b,which=c(1,2))

cl_rnd_c <- lm(cluster_roundness ~ location+cluster+image +location*cluster*image, weekc)
anova(cl_rnd_c)

anova(cmp_shp)

  geom_boxplot()+
